Prayers
Active prayers drain your prayer points.
Restore them at the chapel altar — or at a darker shrine far to the west.

Options

Checking autosave…
How to play: left-click to walk or use things. Right-click for more options. Arrow keys or WASD orbit and tilt the camera, scroll to zoom, middle-drag to look around, and click the compass to face north. Chop trees, mine rocks and net shrimps; cook your catch at the campfire; bury bones for Prayer. The guide by the fire can help.

THE WILDERNESS
Beyond this ditch lies the Wilderness — a lawless waste.
If you die out there, you will LOSE the items you carry.

World Map — St. Paul's School
✕
Map features
The yellow ✕ marks your position · press Esc or click outside to close

A tiny old-school adventure set on the grounds of St. Paul's School, Concord NH — ponds, bridges and brick halls in glorious low-poly 3D. Train your skills, fight giant rats, and watch the numbers go up.

Choose a saved character to continue, or create a new one.
